project.name: OutreachAI
project.description: AI-powered lead generation and outreach automation platform for agency owners

milestones.name: Foundation & MVP
milestones.description: Core SaaS infrastructure: auth, payments, quotas, lead finder, dashboard — working end-to-end for a single user

milestones.name: AI & Lead Management
milestones.description: AI email generation, saved leads management, CRM pipeline, user settings, onboarding

milestones.name: Sequences & Outreach
milestones.description: Follow-up sequences, website audit, multi-channel scripts, email integration

milestones.name: Production & Quality
milestones.description: Testing coverage, deployment pipeline, error monitoring, performance, accessibility

tasks.title: Bootstrap design system tokens and constants
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want consistent design tokens and copy constants so that the UI looks cohesive and changes are easy to maintain.
tasks.description: Create CSS tokens (spacing/color/type/shadow/radius/motion) and copy constants structure.
acceptance_criteria: tokens.css exists with all required variables
copy/ has errors.ts, labels.ts, empty-states.ts, notifications.ts

tasks.title: Build shared pattern components
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want clear loading/error/empty states so that the product always communicates what is happening and what I can do next.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: EmptyState, ErrorState, LoadingState, ConfirmDialog, Toast.
acceptance_criteria: All components use design tokens exclusively

tasks.title: Set up development environment and database
tasks.user_story: As a developer, I want a local database and schema tooling so that I can build and test features reliably.
tasks.description: Local Postgres via Docker Compose, Drizzle schema/migrations, db scripts, .env.example.
acceptance_criteria: Drizzle schema and initial migration checked in

tasks.title: Implement user authentication (better-auth) — baseline
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to sign up and log in securely so that my data and usage limits are private to my account.
out_of_scope: Email verification and password reset (handled in auth-02)
tasks.description: Email/password auth, sessions, route protection middleware, login/signup UI.
acceptance_criteria: Session available in API routes via helper

tasks.title: Integrate Stripe subscriptions — server
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to upgrade and manage my subscription so that my plan and limits reflect what I pay for.
tasks.description: Stripe checkout, portal, and webhook-based subscription sync to DB.
acceptance_criteria: Webhook validates signature and updates subscription row

tasks.title: Implement usage quotas and rate limiting — server
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want clear usage limits so that I can understand what I can do on my plan and avoid unexpected blocks.
out_of_scope: UI for displaying usage (handled in dashboard/leads UI tasks)
tasks.description: Quota window per billing period, plan limits, enforcement helpers, and /api/quota.

tasks.title: Harden auth: email verification, password reset, logout UX
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to verify my email and reset my password so that I can securely regain access to my account.
tasks.description: Add missing auth flows and UI wiring needed for real-world SaaS.
acceptance_criteria: Logout action present in authenticated UI

tasks.title: Pricing + Billing UI (upgrade, manage subscription)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to compare plans and upgrade from the product so that I can unlock higher limits without contacting support.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: Pricing page, plan comparison, upgrade buttons, billing portal link.

tasks.title: Authenticated app shell (layout + navigation)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want a clear navigation shell so that I can move between lead finding, saved leads, settings, and billing without getting lost.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: Persistent authenticated layout: sidebar/nav, user menu, logout, plan badge.

states_required.loading: Session loading skeleton in user menu
states_required.error: Session failure - minimal shell with logout
states_required.success: Full nav with active route highlight

acceptance_criteria: Nav links: Dashboard, Lead Finder, Saved Leads, Settings, Billing

tasks.title: Leads persistence API (save + list + delete)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to save leads so that I can come back later to contact them and generate outreach.
out_of_scope: Full CRM pipeline tracking (handled in CRM tasks)
tasks.description: Add endpoints to save scraped leads to DB and retrieve them per user.
acceptance_criteria: POST save lead(s) to saved_leads with ownership

tasks.title: Lead Finder UI (auth-gated)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to search for leads and save the best ones so that I can build an outreach list quickly.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: Search form, results table, usage display, save/export actions.
acceptance_criteria: Shows usage remaining and handles quota exceeded

tasks.title: User settings API (offer profile + onboarding flag)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to define my offer so that the AI can write outreach that matches what I actually sell.
tasks.description: Create a settings table and endpoints for offer profile fields and onboarding state.
acceptance_criteria: Create Drizzle schema for user_settings (userId, offerWhat, offerWho, offerDiff, onboardingCompleted)
GET /api/settings returns current settings for authenticated user

tasks.title: New user onboarding flow (3 steps)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want a guided setup so that I can start generating useful outreach without guessing what to configure.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: After signup, guide the user through defining their offer. Skippable, and only shown until completed.
acceptance_criteria: 3 steps: what you sell, who you help, differentiator
Each step persists via settings API

tasks.title: Dashboard home (usage + recent leads + plan card)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want a dashboard so that I can see my usage, plan, and next actions at a glance.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: Dashboard with usage cards, recent saved leads, and billing/plan management entry points.
acceptance_criteria: Usage cards show used/limit for searches, leads returned, AI messages
Recent saved leads widget (last 5) with quick actions
Plan card with upgrade/manage billing CTA

tasks.title: Saved leads page (list + search + bulk actions)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to manage my saved leads so that I can track who I plan to contact and take actions quickly.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: Saved leads management UI: search, filter, pagination, bulk delete/export, per-row actions.
acceptance_criteria: Per-row actions: generate email, open maps, delete

tasks.title: OpenAI email generation API (quota-gated)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want AI-written outreach for a lead so that I can contact more prospects with less manual writing.
tasks.description: Add /api/ai/email endpoint that generates a personalized email using saved lead + user offer settings, enforcing ai_message quotas.
acceptance_criteria: Reads lead from DB and user offer from settings
Handles OpenAI failures without deducting quota

tasks.title: AI email generator UI (tone + preview + copy)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to choose a tone and copy an email so that I can quickly send outreach that matches my style.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: UI to generate and preview emails for a saved lead, with tone selection and copy/regenerate actions.
acceptance_criteria: Copy subject + copy full email actions

tasks.title: Testing framework (unit + E2E) and CI gate
tasks.user_story: As a developer, I want automated tests and CI checks so that regressions are caught before release.
tasks.description: Set up Vitest and Playwright, and add CI workflow to run type-check + tests.
acceptance_criteria: At least 5 unit tests for core helpers
At least 2 E2E flows (signup/login, lead search)
CI runs bun install, tsc --noEmit, unit tests, E2E (optional on PR)

tasks.title: Settings UI (account + offer profile + billing entry points)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to update my account and offer settings so that the product stays accurate as my positioning changes.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: Settings page where users can edit their offer profile, see account info, access billing portal, and complete onboarding later.
acceptance_criteria: Offer profile editor (what/whom/differentiator) backed by settings API
Account section shows email + created date (if available)
Billing section links to pricing/upgrade and billing portal

tasks.title: Compliance baseline (GDPR + CAN-SPAM) and data deletion
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want the product to handle data responsibly so that I can use it without legal or reputational risk.
tasks.description: Minimum compliance baseline for a SaaS handling scraped business contact data.
acceptance_criteria: Privacy policy and terms placeholders added (routes + copy)
Data deletion endpoint: delete user + related rows (saved_leads, quotas, subscriptions where applicable)
Document what data is stored and why (docs)

tasks.title: Deployment & release setup (Vercel + prod DB + env)
tasks.user_story: As a developer, I want a reproducible production deployment so that releases are safe and repeatable.
tasks.description: Prepare production deployment: hosting, database, env vars, and release checklist.
acceptance_criteria: Stripe webhooks configured for prod endpoint

tasks.title: Observability (error monitoring + structured logs)
tasks.user_story: As a developer, I want error monitoring and structured logs so that I can detect, triage, and fix production issues quickly.
tasks.description: Add error monitoring and structured server logs for API routes.
acceptance_criteria: Error monitoring configured (e.g., Sentry) for server + client
Server logs include requestId/userId where possible
Webhook errors logged with event id

tasks.title: Security hardening (headers, CSRF assumptions, webhook defense)
tasks.user_story: As a developer, I want baseline security hardening so that the app is resilient against common web attacks and webhook abuse.
definition_of_done: Security headers verified in deployed environment
tasks.description: Baseline web security hardening for Next.js app + payment webhooks.
acceptance_criteria: Security headers set (CSP baseline, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy)
Stripe webhook: idempotency protections in DB updates
API routes validate input with a schema (Zod)

tasks.title: Accessibility audit & fixes (keyboard, ARIA, contrast)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want the product to be accessible so that I can use it reliably with keyboard navigation and assistive technologies.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed for affected UI
tasks.description: Run an accessibility audit and fix issues across all authenticated pages.
acceptance_criteria: Keyboard navigation works for all core flows
Color contrast verified for primary components
Forms have labels and error messages accessible

tasks.title: Performance pass (bundle, caching, Core Web Vitals)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want the app to feel fast so that I can search, save, and generate outreach without waiting.
tasks.description: Measure and improve performance for the main product pages.
acceptance_criteria: Avoid client bundles for server-only modules
Core Web Vitals baseline measured and documented

tasks.title: CRM pipeline model (stages + saved lead status)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to track the status of each lead so that I can prioritize follow-ups and avoid losing opportunities.
out_of_scope: Full CRM with deals and revenue tracking
tasks.description: Add a pipeline stage to saved leads and APIs to update it.
acceptance_criteria: PATCH /api/leads/saved/:id updates stage with ownership checks
Stage changes recorded in an activity log table

tasks.title: CRM pipeline UI (kanban stages)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want a kanban view of my leads so that I can quickly see what stage each lead is in and move them as I progress.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: Kanban board for saved leads with drag-and-drop stage changes.
acceptance_criteria: Works on mobile (fallback to select stage)

tasks.title: Follow-up sequences model + generation API
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want a follow-up sequence so that I can re-contact leads without rewriting everything each time.
tasks.description: Store and generate 5-step follow-up sequences for a saved lead, quota-gated.
acceptance_criteria: DB schema for sequences and sequence_emails
POST /api/ai/sequence generates 5 emails for a lead
Quota accounted for (ai_message units per sequence)

tasks.title: Sequence builder UI (5 emails + timing)
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want to review and edit a sequence before sending so that it matches my voice and offer.
definition_of_done: UI QA checklist passed (UI tasks only)
tasks.description: UI to generate, review, edit, and export a follow-up sequence.
acceptance_criteria: Generate sequence from a saved lead

tasks.title: Website audit MVP (Lighthouse) + outreach summary
tasks.user_story: As an agency owner, I want a quick website audit so that my outreach includes concrete, specific observations.
tasks.description: Generate a lightweight website audit for a lead website and use it as context for outreach.
acceptance_criteria: Given a URL, produce performance/seo/accessibility summary
Expose audit data to AI prompt for more personalized emails

tasks.title: Maintenance planning (backups, runbooks, dependency cadence)
tasks.user_story: As a developer, I want operational runbooks so that incidents and routine maintenance can be handled predictably.
tasks.description: Document operational runbooks and establish maintenance cadence.
acceptance_criteria: Runbook: how to handle Stripe webhook failures
